dataSource: round-2.summary.json (full metrics) + 4 recovered cases from round-2.json (truncation again at case 5 write)

metricsHistory.note: Difficulty strictly increases across rounds; same-case comparison shows monotonic improvement.

fixesFromR1Confirmed: foodPrecision 0.9 → 1.0 — no more hallucination (even 콩나물해장국 handled correctly)
unitAcc 0.8 → 1.0 — unit mapping table + fractional rules working

newWeaknesses.likelyCase: r2-07 partial-eat: '떡볶이 조금만 먹었어' (expected 0.5, model likely emitted 1)
newWeaknesses.rootCause: Prompt §2 covered '반' but not '조금만'/'약간'/'살짝' class of vague quantifiers.

newWeaknesses.evidence: part of quantityAcc miss, possibly r2-10
newWeaknesses.likelyCase: r2-10: '라면 한 봉지 끓였는데 반만 먹었어' (expected 0.5, model likely emitted 1)
newWeaknesses.rootCause: Model grabs the cooked quantity, not the consumed quantity.
newWeaknesses.fix: §2 add explicit rule: 실제 섭취량 우선.

newWeaknesses.rootCause: §6 only lists explicit numerical timings; '한참' not mapped.
newWeaknesses.fix: §6 add: 한참 뒤 / 한참 있다가 / 꽤 지나서 → postmeal_2h.

appliedPatches: §2 복합 분수 표현 섹션 뒤에 '어림 수량어' 블록 추가
§6 postmeal_2h 키워드에 한참 뒤/한참 있다가/꽤 지나서 추가
§7 명시적 숫자 시간 override 규칙 추가 (r2-08 강화)
nextAction: Design 10 new Round 3 adversarial cases → run phase-eval --round=3 → analyze → merge best prompt → apply to src/app/api/parse-meal/route.ts.
